article.description: — Jalen Brunson scored 34 points, reserve Jordan Clarkson had 25 and the New York Knicks came from 17 down in the fourth quarter to beat the Cleveland Cavaliers 126-124 on Thursday and win on Christmas Day for the third straight year.
article.headline: Brunson and the reserves lead a Christmas comeback as the Knicks beat the Cavaliers 126-124

images.caption: Jalen Brunson gets some space and knocks down the and-1 3-pointer.
images.name: Jalen Brunson nails the trey plus a foul

article.linkText: Brunson and the reserves lead a Christmas comeback as the Knicks beat the Cavaliers 126-124
article.story: NEW YORK -- — Jalen Brunson scored 34 points, reserve Jordan Clarkson had 25 and the New York Knicks came from 17 down in the fourth quarter to beat the Cleveland Cavaliers 126-124 on Thursday and win on Christmas Day for the third straight year. Reserves Tyler Kolek and Mitchell Robinson sparked the comeback after the Cavaliers led 103-86 early in the final period. Kolek had 16 points and nine assists, and had fans chanting his name after a late block on Donovan Mitchell that originally was called a foul but was overturned on review. Robinson hustled after offensive rebounds to keep possessions alive and finished with 13 boards. Brunson made the go-ahead 3-pointer with 1:05 remaining, after he, Kolek and Clarkson all hit from behind the arc in a 13-2 run that cut Cleveland's 12-point lead to 111-110. Mitchell had 34 points, seven rebounds and six assists. Darius Garland added 20 points and 10 assists, but the Cavaliers blew their chance at a third straight win. Evan Mobley finished with 14 points and nine rebounds after missing five games with a strained left calf. The Cavs raced to an 18-3 lead behind 10 points from Mitchell and led 38-23 after one quarter. But Clarkson opened the second with consecutive 3-pointers, and after a Cavs 3-pointer, the Knicks ripped off an 18-0 burst to take a 47-41 lead. The Knicks made 12 of their first 14 shots in the second, before Mobley had Cleveland's final four baskets as New York took a 60-58 edge into the break. Cleveland quickly regained control in the third. Mitchell slammed down a lob pass that Garland threw from beyond halfcourt to cap a 10-3 burst to open the period, and Mitchell later hit a 3-pointer to cap an 18-4 spurt that turned a 71-all tie into an 89-75 advantage for the Cavs. Up next Cavaliers: Visit Houston on Saturday. Knicks: Visit Atlanta on Saturday. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/hub/nba

images.name: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander [1296x729]

images.alt: Cleveland Cavaliers guard Donovan Mitchell (45) against the Phoenix Suns in the first half at Mortgage Matchup Center.

videos.description: The Knicks erase a 17-point fourth-quarter deficit to take down the Cavaliers to open up the Christmas Day slate.
videos.headline: Knicks come from behind to beat Cavaliers

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Knicks come from behind to beat Cavaliers) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Donovan Mitchell tosses it up for Jarrett Allen for a big Cavaliers slam dunk.
videos.headline: Donovan Mitchell finds Jarrett Allen for the dunk

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Donovan Mitchell finds Jarrett Allen for the dunk) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Jalen Brunson makes a crossover move to get the bucket for the Knicks.
videos.headline: Jalen Brunson scores off a nice crossover

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jalen Brunson scores off a nice crossover) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Jordan Clarkson gets a steal and knocks down a 3-pointer on the other end for the Knicks.
videos.headline: Jordan Clarkson makes a great defensive play, then hits a 3

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jordan Clarkson makes a great defensive play, then hits a 3) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Mikal Bridges blocks Darius Garland's shot and makes the layup on the other end.
videos.headline: Mikal Bridges gets a huge block, then makes the layup

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Mikal Bridges gets a huge block, then makes the layup) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Evan Mobley gets up for the beautiful slam dunk
videos.headline: Evan Mobley skies for a big dunk

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Evan Mobley skies for a big dunk) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Jalen Brunson rises over Donovan Mitchell, knocks down the 3-pointer and gets the foul.
videos.headline: Jalen Brunson nails the and-1 trey over Donovan Mitchell

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jalen Brunson nails the and-1 trey over Donovan Mitchell) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Darius Garland finds Donovan Mitchell ahead for a big jam for the Cavaliers.
videos.headline: Donovan Mitchell soars for the alley-oop dunk

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Donovan Mitchell soars for the alley-oop dunk) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Dean Wade makes the tricky layup and gets the foul against the Knicks.
videos.headline: Dean Wade gets the and-1 for the Cavaliers

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Dean Wade gets the and-1 for the Cavaliers) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Jaylon Tyson rises up for a major jam to increase the Cavaliers' lead against the Knicks.
videos.headline: Jaylon Tyson throws down a massive jam for the Cavs

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jaylon Tyson throws down a massive jam for the Cavs) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Josh Hart limps off the court after rolling an ankle.
videos.headline: Josh Hart exits game with injury

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Josh Hart exits game with injury) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Tyler Kolek sinks a clutch three in the fourth quarter to cut the Cavaliers' lead.
videos.headline: Tyler Kolek knocks down a big three for Knicks

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Tyler Kolek knocks down a big three for Knicks) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Jalen Brunson knocks down a 3-pointer over Donovan Mitchell for a Knicks lead late in the fourth quarter.
videos.headline: Tracy Morgan mystified by this Jalen Brunson go-ahead 3-pointer

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Tracy Morgan mystified by this Jalen Brunson go-ahead 3-pointer) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Donovan Mitchell hits the 3-pointer vs. New York Knicks
videos.headline: Donovan Mitchell hits a big three late vs. the Knicks

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Donovan Mitchell hits a big three late vs. the Knicks) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Donovan Mitchell elevates for a huge slam for the Cavaliers, then OG Anunoby dunks one to extend the Knicks' lead.
videos.headline: Mitchell and Anunoby trade back-to-back dunks

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Mitchell and Anunoby trade back-to-back dunks) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: The Knicks finish off their comeback with a wild late sequence to down the Cavaliers.
videos.headline: Knicks hold off Cavaliers in wild late sequence

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Knicks hold off Cavaliers in wild late sequence) 2025/12/25 ESHEET
